idea-plugin.name: WSL Language Support
idea-plugin.description:
WSL (Workflow Specific Language) Support for JetBrains IDEs

Provides language support for the Kuetix Workflow Specific Language (.wsl files) and SimplifiedWSL (.swsl files).

Features:

  • Syntax highlighting for WSL and SimplifiedWSL workflows
  • Keyword completion for workflow elements
  • File type recognition and icons
  • Code structure navigation
  • Error highlighting
  • Support for hierarchical execution (feature, solution, workflow types)

WSL Keywords:

  • module - Declares a namespaced module name
  • import - Brings other modules/namespaces into scope
  • extends - Indicates inheritance of resolvers/configs
  • const - Declares key/value constants
  • workflow - Declares a workflow
  • state - Defines a state block
  • action - Specifies an action to execute
  • on success/error - Transition conditions
  • end ok/error - Terminal state markers

SimplifiedWSL Keywords:

  • def - Defines reusable action definitions
  • feature - Declares a feature workflow type
  • solution - Declares a solution workflow type
  • -> - Forward flow operator
  • <- - Error binding operator
  • . - Terminal operator
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 2024.1.0

  • Added SimplifiedWSL support (.swsl files)
  • Full syntax highlighting for SimplifiedWSL files
  • Support for SimplifiedWSL workflow types (feature, solution, workflow)
  • SimplifiedWSL operators: ->, <-, .
  • SimplifiedWSL def keyword for reusable definitions
  • Hierarchical execution examples
  • Comprehensive documentation

Version 2023.3.0

  • Initial release of WSL Language Support plugin
  • Full syntax highlighting for WSL files
  • Keyword completion for workflow elements
  • Dynamic module and method completion from modules.json files
  • Multi-source module loading (project root, workflows/, runtime/workflows/)
  • Auto-reload modules on file changes
  • Robust error handling - skip invalid modules gracefully
  • Code structure view for workflows and states
  • Brace matching and code commenting support
  • Customizable color scheme
  • Compatible with IntelliJ Platform 2023.3 - 2025.2
